report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#345-349) for Apr 21–26 covering CLARITY Act crunch time (2-week markup window), Glamsterdam upgrade (10K TPS, Devnet-5), BlackRock IBIT $1.7B inflows, staking/restaking guide launch, and FOMC preview. Newsletter v22 themed 'Two Weeks to Regulate Crypto — Or Not'. 2 new social card SVGs (CLARITY Act 4-way deadlock, Glamsterdam 10K TPS). Content calendar extends through Apr 26 across v22 cycle.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #345: CLARITY Act Crunch Time — 3-tweet news thread (Mon Apr 21, 2PM ET) covering Senate Banking Committee's 2-week markup window, Tillis-Alsobrooks stablecoin yield compromise, 4-way deadlock, midterm deadline. Links to Crypto Regulations guide.

Tweet #346: Glamsterdam Upgrade — 3-tweet educational thread (Tue Apr 22, 11AM ET) covering 10K TPS (10x current), 78.6% gas reduction, EIP-7732 ePBS, EIP-7928 BALs, parallel tx processing, Devnet-5 status. Links to Pectra/Glamsterdam guide.

Tweet #347: BlackRock IBIT $1.7B — 2-tweet data thread (Wed Apr 23, 3PM ET) covering $1.7B of $2B BTC ETF inflows over 4 weeks (85% market share), institutional vs retail sentiment divergence, stablecoin $316B ATH. Links to Whale Tracker.

Tweet #348: Staking Guide Launch — 2-tweet educational thread (Fri Apr 25, 1PM ET) covering EigenLayer restaking, Babylon BTC staking, LRT yield stacking, layered slashing risk. Links to Staking guide.
Tweet #349: Weekend FOMC Preview + Roundup (Sat Apr 26, 11AM ET) — weekly recap covering CLARITY Act, Glamsterdam, IBIT flows, staking guide, F&G extreme fear streak, FOMC Apr 28-29 preview.

Newsletter v22: 'Two Weeks to Regulate Crypto — Or Not' (Thu Apr 24, 10AM ET) — Market Pulse (BTC $66,246, ETH ~$1,950, F&G 8/100, IBIT $1.7B, stablecoin $316B), 4 new learn guides (Staking, Flash Loans, Euler V2, Hyperlane), Worth Reading (Regulations + Glamsterdam), Degen Corner (IBIT institutional divergence, stablecoin yield vs rewards regulatory arbitrage).
Discord/Telegram: CLARITY Act watch post (Mon Apr 21, 3PM ET) + 4 new learn guides announcement (Wed Apr 23, 2PM ET).
Total tweets all-time: 349 (5 new this cycle), content scheduled Apr 21–26

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: CLARITY ACT CRUNCH: Senate Banking Committee has only 2 in-session weeks (Apr 13 & Apr 20) to advance the bill. Tillis-Alsobrooks compromise bans stablecoin yield on exchanges but allows rewards/incentives. 4-way deadlock between stablecoin yield, crypto conflict-of-interest rules, CFTC appointments, and market structure language. Failure before May effectively kills the bill before midterms.

GLAMSTERDAM ON DEVNET-5: Ethereum's biggest upgrade since the Merge targeting June. 10K TPS (10x), 78.6% gas reduction, gas limit 60M→200M. EIP-7732 (ePBS) and EIP-7928 (BALs) enable parallel tx processing and MEV mitigation. ETH at ~$1,950 (2022 levels) creates asymmetric risk/reward.

INSTITUTIONAL DIVERGENCE: BlackRock IBIT absorbed $1.7B of $2B total BTC ETF inflows over 4 consecutive weeks (85% market share). Morgan Stanley MSBT expanding custody. Retail F&G at 8/100 while institutions accumulate. Stablecoin supply at $316B ATH — capital preservation, not exit.

FOMC APR 28-29: Potentially Powell's final meeting as Chair. Rate direction signal expected. Liberation Day tariffs creating inflationary pressure — Powell expects higher inflation and lower growth. Markets pricing in a hold.
992+ PUBLISHED PAGES: All-time high, publish queue empty. 4 new learn guides today (Euler V2, Hyperlane, Staking, Flash Loans). 7 courses live. Full content library operational.
P0 DEPLOYMENT BLOCKER PERSISTS: Day 8+ without production push. 62 uncommitted files. sui-hashi build conflict unresolved. All new content queued behind git push.

ETH: ~$1,950 (-4.4% — Glamsterdam Devnet-5, June target)
Total crypto market cap: ~$2.23T (-3.86% weekly)

BTC dominance: 56.2%, ETH dominance: 10.6%
